module_sme_rollup.name: Employee Data & Compliance

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your HR system is secure, accessible, and connected to your payroll, government agencies, and banks. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA when handling employee NRICs, salaries, and medical data—this family enforces that compliance and prevents unauthorised access. It matters when your HR team works from home and needs mobile access, or when you integrate payroll with your accountant's system.

Core HR.narrative: This is the backbone of your HR system—a single, authoritative record of every employee's personal details, contracts, and history. Singapore SMEs need this to onboard new staff quickly, manage departures smoothly, and keep all employment documents in one secure place. It matters when you hire your first 10 employees and need to scale to 50 without losing track of contracts or offer letters.

Time & Attendance.narrative: This family tracks when employees work, manages their leave requests, and calculates overtime and shift pay automatically. For retail, F&B, and logistics SMEs in Singapore, accurate time tracking directly affects payroll accuracy and labour cost control. It matters when you have shift workers or need to prove compliance with MOM working-hour rules during an inspection.

Payroll & Statutory.narrative: This family calculates salaries, deducts CPF and income tax correctly, generates payslips, and files mandatory returns to IRAS and MOM every month and year. Singapore SMEs cannot operate without this—getting payroll wrong costs penalties and damages employee trust. It matters every payday and every quarter when you file CPF submissions or annual tax returns.

Talent & Growth.narrative: This family helps you hire the right people, develop them, and keep them engaged through training, performance reviews, and recognition. Singapore SMEs with high turnover lose productivity and incur recruitment costs; this family reduces attrition by showing employees a clear career path. It matters when you want to retain your best technician or manager, or when you need to fill a critical role quickly.

Lifecycle & Analytics.narrative: This family gives you visibility into workforce trends—headcount forecasts, turnover rates, cost per hire, and early warning signs of attrition. Singapore SMEs often make hiring and retention decisions based on gut feel; dashboards here turn that into data-driven choices. It matters when your CFO asks 'why is our turnover 30%?' or when you need to justify a new hire to the board.

required.rationale:
3 cores — the only module with 3 because PSG validation showed
33% of HR sols are single_core_full on payroll specifically
(Talenox, JustLogin payroll mode). Payroll specialists are a
distinct vendor market from HR-ops players (BambooHR-style)
and from talent suites (SuccessFactors-style). The prior
binary cut bundled payroll with HR ops, masking that
payroll-only is a real market. Splitting it out reflects how
SG SMEs actually buy: many start with payroll-only, then add
HR ops or talent as they grow.
